afterSnapshot.name: computeLegWarnings
afterSnapshot.purpose: Flag per-leg sailing risks (headwind, low visibility, pressure drop, arrival after sunset) from already-resolved forecast numbers and return a risk level.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Risk warnings must be a pure, directly unit-testable function fed resolved numbers, isolating messy timezone/forecast-hour resolution in the orchestrator.
implementation: Pure function in the app's established style: defensive coercion, config-driven thresholds passed in, returns warning codes/labels plus a 0/1/2+ riskLevel tier.
